82% of Cardano ($ADA) Addresses Are ‘Out of the Money’, Data Shows
articles.description: With the price of Cardano’s native $ADA token below the $1 mark, 82% of the cryptocurrency’s holders are currently “out of the money.” The price of ADA has been steadily dropping ever since it hit a $3.1 all-time high in November 2021. According to data from cryptocurrency analytics startup IntoTheBlock, 82% of Cardano token holders […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Is The Safe Asset With Consumer Price Index At 8.5%
